ogTitle: Keppel Sands vs Keriri Island: Climate Safety

heading: Keppel Sands vs Keriri Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keppel Sands, Queensland and Keriri Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keppel Sands and Keriri Island have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Keppel Sands or Keriri Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keppel Sands has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Keriri Island scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keppel Sands scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Keriri Island scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keppel Sands or Keriri Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keppel Sands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
